methodsAttempted.query: site:upf.edu Universitat Pompeu Fabra inteligencia artificial generativa docencia evaluacion integridad academica
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced an official UPF CLIK page about generative AI in teaching and academic work, plus repository PDFs and course documents with weaker policy specificity.
Followed official links from the CLIK page to the UPF electronic-office instruction PDF and the UPF BibTIC generative AI guide.

methodsAttempted.query: site:upf.edu UPF ChatGPT inteligencia artificial generativa estudiantes politica privacidad seguridad
methodsAttempted.notes: Second Firecrawl search mainly returned repository and course PDFs; no separate central IT/security policy page was verified.

artifacts.summary: Official UPF discovery found one central announcement, one university instruction PDF on evaluation and academic integrity, and one UPF library/IT guide page on licensed generative AI tools. Repository/course PDFs were rejected as less authoritative or course-specific.

stopConditions: Stop at public official UPF sources; do not use repository/course PDFs as policy evidence.
Do not bypass Cloudflare JavaScript/cookie challenges, login gates, CAPTCHAs, paywalls, or robots restrictions.
Do not stage raw HTML, PDFs, screenshots, or extracted full text.

artifacts.errorReason: Static HTTP fetch returned a JavaScript/cookie challenge page, so the run did not treat it as evidence text and used Firecrawl extraction instead.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow teaching-guidance candidate; the source describes a guide and recommendations, not a binding policy.
Approved because the instruction directly states legitimate or fraudulent use depends on the activity and instructions.
Approved because the Catalan instruction uses binding language that students must identify and cite AI-generated fragments.
Approved because the instruction directly says non-permitted, dishonest, or illegitimate AI use is rejected and must be penalized.
Approved as a narrow tool-treatment candidate because the guide directly says UPF provides Gemini and NotebookLM.
Approved as a privacy/data-handling candidate limited to UPF Google Workspace use of the named licensed tools.

artifacts.title: Universitat Pompeu Fabra AI Policy Staged Crawl
artifacts.summary: Staged crawl found official UPF guidance and an instruction covering generative AI in teaching, academic work, assessment, academic integrity, and UPF-licensed Gemini and NotebookLM access. Claims remain staged agent-reviewed candidates and are not canonical public facts.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The CLIK page was JavaScript/cookie-challenged for static HTTP fetch and was extracted through Firecrawl; no attempt was made to bypass access controls.
No separate central UPF IT/security policy page for generative AI was verified in this run.
Repository and course-guide results were rejected as insufficient for university-wide policy claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
